DIALOGID.TEXT: Hello. Do you own the vehicle in your driveway?
Yes, officer, I do.
Okay. Can you tell me where you were about 15 minutes ago?
Am I being detained, officer?
I'm only asking you where you were. Can you tell me that, or should I come back with a warrant?
Well, what's happening? Is there a problem with my vehicle?
Yes. It matches the description of a vehicle involved in a Hit and Run.
Well, I was home all day. Your source must have a misunderstanding or something.
Can I take a closer look at your vehicle?
Ugh, you got me. I hit the person and drove off, I didn't know what to do. I'm so sorry, don't arrest me please!
Okay, well I have to take you down to the station. Put your hands where I can see them, please.
Fuck this! I ain't going back to jail.
Hey there. Is that your vehicle in the driveway?
Yes, it is. Is everything okay?
Can you tell me where you were about 15 minutes ago?
Can you tell me what is going on? Do I need a lawyer?
Your vehicle matches the description of a vehicle involved in a Hit and Run.
Bullshit! I was home all day!
Okay. We can sort this out at the station. Currently, you are being detained and will have to come down to the station with me.
No! I'm not doing that!
Well unfortunately, at this point, you have no choice.
Stupid cops, stupid justice system. Go screw yourself!
Okay. Go ahead and put your hands where I can see them.
Screw this! Try to catch me pig!
Is that your vehicle in the driveway?
Hello Officer. Yes, it is.
Any reason for so much vehicle damage?
I got in an accident a few days ago. It's in the process of being fixed, officer.
Oh, okay. Did you happen to get in an accident today?
No, I wasn't involved in an accident today. Why do you ask?
This vehicle matches the description of a vehicle involved in a hit and run. And by the way you're talking, I can tell you are nervous. Want to come clean?
I am clean. I didn't get in an accident. Please leave now. You aren't welcomed at my home.
The charge isn't that severe. If you come clean, you might get a lesser sentence. Last chance, do you want to come clean?
Ugh, fine! The person got in my way. I couldn't stop in time. It wasn't my fault, officer, it was theirs...
Okay. We can sort it out at the station. Right now you are being detained. Put your hands where I can see them.
I'm not going back to jail! Stupid pig!
Hello. Do you have a minute? I would like to ask you some questions.
No, sorry. I'm in a hurry!
I am assuming you know why I am here. Can you tell me why you have so much front end damage on your vehicle?
As I said, I don't have time! Please leave!
I am not leaving until you answer my question. Why is there so much damage to your vehicle?
Because some bastard hit me, and now you are going to arrest me, when they caused it!
Well, due to you admitting to me you were just involved in a hit and run, you will need to come down to the station for further questioning.
No, I am staying right here.
No, you aren't. Please, don't make me have to use force. Put your hands where I can see them.
This isn't fair!
Last chance. Put your hands where I can see them.
No, this isn't fair I said!
Do me a favor and keep your hands where I can see them. Is that your vehicle parked over there?
..Yes officer, it is. Is everything alright?
Can you tell me where you were approximately 20 minutes ago?
Can you tell me why you're acting like a dick?
Okay. Would you like to tell me where you were, or should I take you down to the station until our investigation is over?
I was cruising around! I was enjoying my day off and just got done pulling in. What the hell is going on?!
Did you happen to hit someone while you were out?
What?
Don't act like nothing has happened. Last chance, did you hit a person?
Maybe. I would like to talk to my lawyer.
You can, down at the station. Right now, you are under arrest for a Hit and Run. Keep your hands where I can see them.
Fuck you, bitch. Catch me if you can!
Hello. Do you own the boat anchored over there?
Yes, officer, I do.
Okay. Can you tell me where you were about 15 minutes ago?
Am I being detained, officer?
I'm only asking you where you were. Can you tell me that, or should I come back with a warrant?
Well, what's happening? Is there a problem with my boat?
Yes. It matches the description of a watercraft involved in a Hit and Run.
Well, I was home all day. Your source must have a misunderstanding or something.
Can I take a closer look at your boat?
Ugh, you got me. I hit the person and sped off, I didn't know what to do. I'm so sorry, don't arrest me please!
Okay, well I have to take you down to the station. Put your hands where I can see them, please.
Fuck this! I ain't going back to jail.
Hey there. Is that your boat anchored over there?
Yes, it is. Is everything okay?
Can you tell me where you were about 15 minutes ago?
Can you tell me what is going on? Do I need a lawyer?
Your boat matches the description of a watercraft involved in a Hit and Run.
Bullshit! I was home all day!
Okay. We can sort this out at the station. Currently, you are being detained and will have to come down to the station with me.
No! I am not doing that!
Well unfortunately, at this point, you have no choice.
Stupid cops, stupid justice system. Go screw yourself!
Okay. Go ahead and put your hands where I can see them.
Screw this! Try to catch me, pig!
Is that your boat anchored over there?
Hello Officer. Yes, it is.
Is there any reason for so much damage to your boat?
I got in an accident a few days ago. It's in the process of being fixed, officer.
Oh, okay. Did you happen to get in an accident today?
No, I wasn't involved in an accident today. Why do you ask?
Your boat matches the description of a watercraft involved in a hit and run. And by the way you're talking, I can tell you are nervous. Want to come clean?
I am clean. I didn't get in an accident. Please leave now. I don't want to answer any more questions.
The charge isn't that severe. If you come clean, you might get a lesser sentence. Last chance, do you want to come clean?
Ugh, fine! The person got in my way. I couldn't stop in time. It wasn't my fault, officer, it was theirs...
Okay. We can sort it out at the station. Right now you are being detained. Put your hands where I can see them.
I'm not going back to jail! Stupid pig!
Hello. Do you have a minute? I would like to ask you some questions.
No, sorry. I'm in a hurry!
I am assuming you know why I am here. Can you tell me why you have so much front-end damage on your boat?
As I said, I don't have time! Please leave!
I am not leaving until you answer my question. Why is there so much damage to your boat?
Because some bastard got in front of me, and now you are going to arrest me when they caused it!
Well, since you admitted to being involved in a hit and run, you will need to come down to the station for further questioning.
No, I am staying right here.
No, you aren't. Please, don't make me use force. Put your hands where I can see them.
This isn't fair!
Last chance. Put your hands where I can see them.
No, I said this isn't fair!
Do me a favor and keep your hands where I can see them. Is that your boat over there?
..Yes officer, it is. Is everything alright?
Can you tell me where you were approximately 20 minutes ago?
Can you tell me why you're acting like a dick?
Okay. Would you like to tell me where you were, or should I take you down to the station until our investigation is over?
I was cruising around! I was enjoying my day off and just finished docking. What the hell is going on?!
Did you happen to hit someone while you were out?
What?
Don't act like nothing happened. Last chance: did you hit a person?
Maybe. I would like to talk to my lawyer.
You can, down at the station. Right now, you are under arrest for a Hit and Run. Keep your hands where I can see them.
Fuck you, bitch. Catch me if you can!
Hey partner, looks like you found the car I was looking for.
Hi, yeah. I was doing my patrol round when I saw it there.
Anything that could lead us to a suspect?
Sorry, no. There was nobody on the way up here and nothing in the car.
Damn. Well, you can leave. I will take care of the rest.
Okay thanks, see ya.
Hey Partner, seems the BOLO was successful.
Hi, yes. I stopped the car because of the damage to the front wheel and then saw the APB.
Yeah, well, I will take over from here, okay?
Sure, I will back you up.
Thanks, let's go.
Please step out of the vehicle.
No, what did I do wrong? Why did you stop me?
Your car is seriously damaged. You can't continue. Please step out!
The vehicle you are driving has been stolen and was involved in a Hit and Run. You are under arrest. Show me your hands!
I would like to talk to my lawyer.
See ya, bitches!
